stemHtml: Your aircraft is approved for RNP APCH (LNAV). Therefore, it will automatically also be approved for RNP2 operations as they require a lower level of accuracy to RNP APCH (LNAV). Is this statement correct?

options.a: Yes, an approval for RNP with strict accuracy requirements covers either RNP specifications with lower accuracy requirements.
options.b: No, as the aircraft may fail to meet all the functional requirements for RNP2. A separate approval for RNP 2 is necessary.
options.c: Yes, on condition that the pilot holds a valid instrument rating including privilege to fly PBN operations.
options.d: Yes, because an operational approval is NOT required for either of the operations.
